reviews.review_description: so i basically just made a remake of it just it's not an actual remake it's a custom game so i made it in rec room and the name is kitten lockdown

It is a really good game. It’s still in beta, but it’s amazing game. I think you guys should go play and go have fun. It is so much fun. I am the owner of this game. It is so much much fun. I promise you guys won’t regret it if you guys get it.
It is a amazing game but there is enough players
A very good horror game great Modderaters and owners keep up the good work
A moderator joined and showed me around and now I’m sitting here as we speak praying he joins or a different one does so I can show the to my friend and Also we have a few questions to ask
I meet the owner l played this game and its to fun
This game is actually really good all the staff and owners are great and the game is overall fun not laggy and staff don’t abuse power like other fangames
a lot of fun stuff like horor shops and a lot of stuff i recomend it

This is a good game and all but some staff kick you for no reason I kept getting kicked because I was actually falling through the map, but otherwise, this game is pretty good but sometimes when I get out of the map, like they do, they scream at me to get down.
